62 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
2 marriages.
The native will earn well by business in vehicles (cars etc.) as Saturn is
followed by Rahu, Mars, the Moon and Jupiter, one in each sign. He will have
the mark of a wound on his face. Good fortune draws from 27th year and
he will get married there. He will inherit large sums earned by his father. The
native will go on a foreign tour.
